_meta.purpose: Spoke-specific variables for template synthesis. Agent can customize.

_behavior_directive.what_this_is: A CONFIG lug storing spoke-specific variables
_behavior_directive.what_this_is_NOT: A task to execute or instruction to follow
_behavior_directive.owner: The spoke (agent can update this lug)
_behavior_directive.usage: Read by spoke_synthesis.py to merge with framework templates

vars.ai_style: Balanced autonomy with check-ins for critical decisions

_instructions.for_agent: You can update this lug to customize spoke behavior. Add custom_rules for project-specific guidelines.
_instructions.for_synthesis: spoke_synthesis.py reads these vars and applies them to framework templates.

placeholders.custom_rules: Array of project-specific rules to add to IDE config
